name: Arena Group Holdings, Inc.
business: The Arena Group Holdings, Inc. is a brand, data and IP company that builds, acquires, and scales high-performing digital assets. It utilizes a proprietary entrepreneurial publishing model where Expert Contributors earn a share of revenue generated by their channels. The company delivers trusted content across sports & leisure, finance, and lifestyle verticals to millions of users each month.

exposures.sentence: E-commerce and Social Selling: Aggressively expanding our commerce capabilities to capture direct consumer spend. This includes: Affiliate Revenue: Integrating contextually relevant product recommendations across our vertical sites to generate high-margin referral fees. Digital Commerce Integration: Leveraging our 2025 acquisition of the ShopHQ brand and its extensive first-party customer data to bridge the gap between media and marketplace.
As a tech-powered media company, we face cybersecurity threats, such as ransomware and denial-of-service, and attacks on technical infrastructure.
Recent advances in the use of AI may significantly alter the market for our products and services.
